---
title: "Data_Cleaning_Assignment"
output: pdf_document
date: "2026-04-01"
---

```{r}
## 1. Data set overview
# Reading data sets
netflix_data <- read.csv("~/Netflix-Ratings-Analysis/Data/netflix_titles.csv")
imdb_data <- read.csv("~/Netflix-Ratings-Analysis/Data/TMDB_all_movies.csv")

# data overview
head(netflix_data)
str(netflix_data)
summary(netflix_data)

head(imdb_data)
str(imdb_data)
summary(imdb_data)

# Notes
# imdb_rating has 712327 missing values, def need to fix that.
# netflix release year is int
# imdb's release year is chr




## 2. Variable 1 Cleaning: Cleaning Title and Year 
#install.packages("dplyr")
#install.packages("stringr")
library(dplyr)
library(stringr)

# cleaning title
netflix_clean <- netflix_data %>% 
  mutate(title_clean = str_to_lower(title) %>%
         str_trim() %>%
         str_replace_all("[^a-z0-9 ]", "") %>%
         str_squish())

imdb_clean <- imdb_data %>% 
  mutate(title_clean = str_to_lower(title) %>%
         str_trim() %>%
         str_replace_all("[^a-z0-9 ]", "") %>%
         str_squish())

# cleaning release year
imdb_clean <- imdb_clean %>%
  mutate(release_year = as.numeric(substr(release_date, 1, 4))) %>%
  filter(!is.na(release_year),
         release_year >= 1900,
         release_year <= 2021)

summary(netflix_clean$release_year)
summary(imdb_clean$release_year)


# Notes
# we will be merging on title and release year so we need to clean those 2 cols before joining
# str_to_lower(title) conveets all letters to lowercase
# str_trim() removes extra spaces at the beginning and end
# str_replace_all("[^a-z0-9 ]", "") removes everything that is not lowercase letters, numbers (0-9) or spaces. so just removes punctuations so that dosent interfere with the join.
# str_squish()) remoes extra spaces between words
# substr(release_date, 1, 4) takes first 4 characters so the year
# as.numeric() will convert chr to int
# after converting imdb's release year to int when i did summary i saw min year was 1874 and max year was 2069 so i limitied the clean release year to 1900-2021



## 3. Variable 2 Cleaning: Cleaning imdb rating and votes
imdb_clean <- imdb_clean %>%
  filter(!is.na(imdb_rating),
         !is.na(imdb_votes),
         imdb_votes > 50)
         
# notes:
# dropping imdb ratings and votes that are null and setting limit to imdb votes

## 4. Variable 3 Cleaning: Merging the two dataset
## 5. Before vs After Comparison
## 6. Conclusion



```
